heading: Beenaam Valley vs Beerburrum — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Beenaam Valley, Queensland and Beerburrum, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Beerburrum has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Beenaam Valley (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Beenaam Valley or Beerburrum safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Beenaam Valley has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Beerburrum scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Beenaam Valley scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Beerburrum scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Beenaam Valley or Beerburrum?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Beerburrum has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
